violations.description: General food protection. — --Potentially hazardous food was not stored at proper temperature of. -Ice cream unit had been set at 10C after cleaning this morning. Found at product at 59-62F. COS to 4C (39.2F) (product at 39-45F before departure).

Variance requirement for specialized processing methods. — --Food establishment did not obtain approved variance or HACCP plan from regulatory authority for special process of yogurt. -Facility is making yogurt in-house but does not have a HACCP plan in place. *Owner removed from store front immeiately.

Employee dressing areas and lockers. — --employees' clothing/possessions were in an area where contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items may occur. -Tip money cup stored in fridge.
